message:
fix: update frankensearch to rev with hyphen-preserving tokenizer

Hyphenated bead IDs like bd-q3fy were being split into separate
tokens, making them unsearchable by exact ID.

Fixes #131

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
